common.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
common.tooManyRequestsRetry: Too many attempts. Please try again in {seconds} seconds.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue.

forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset it.

reset.title: Reset your password
reset.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
reset.invalidLinkText: This link is missing information. Please request a new one.
reset.success: Your password has been updated. Please sign in.
reset.expired: This reset link is invalid or has expired.

invite.title: Accept your invitation
invite.subtitle: Set a password to activate your account.
invite.invalidLinkText: This link is missing information. Please ask an administrator for a new invitation.
invite.success: Your account is ready. Please sign in.
invite.expired: This invitation is invalid or has expired.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.subtitle: Enter the code from your authenticator app.
twoFactor.recoverySubtitle: Enter one of your recovery codes.
twoFactor.invalid: The code is invalid. Please try again.

email.subtitle: Enter the code we emailed you.

users.inviteHint: The user will receive an email with a link to set their password.
users.cannotDeleteSelf: You can't delete your own account.
users.cannotDeactivateSelf: You can't deactivate your own account.
users.protectedTooltip: This account is protected and can't be modified.
users.noTwoFactor: This user doesn't have two-factor enabled.

resetTwoFactorConfirm.title: Reset two-factor authentication
resetTwoFactorConfirm.text: Reset two-factor for {name}? Their current authenticator and recovery codes stop working, and they'll set it up again on next sign-in.

deactivateConfirm.title: Deactivate user
deactivateConfirm.text: Deactivate {name}? They'll be signed out and blocked from signing in until reactivated.

delete.title: Delete role
delete.text: Delete the {name} role? This cannot be undone.

settings.readonlyHint: You have read-only access to settings.

user_creation_mode.label: New-user creation
user_creation_mode.description: How new users get access when an admin creates them.

two_factor_mode.label: Two-factor authentication
two_factor_mode.description: Require a time-based one-time code at sign-in, in addition to a password.

two_factor_methods.label: Allowed two-factor methods
two_factor_methods.description: Which second factor users may set up. Authenticator apps are more secure than email.

user_creation_mode.choice: Let the admin choose per user

two_factor_mode.optional: Optional — users may enable it themselves
two_factor_mode.required: Required — everyone must set it up

profile.description: Update your personal information and password.

avatar.title: Profile photo
avatar.subtitle: Upload a picture to personalize your account.
avatar.hint: JPEG, PNG or WebP, up to {max} MB.
avatar.invalidType: Choose a JPEG, PNG or WebP image.
avatar.tooLarge: That image is too large — the maximum is {max} MB.

info.title: Profile information
info.subtitle: Update your name and email address.

password.title: Change password
password.subtitle: Use a long, unique password to keep your account secure.

security.description: Add an extra layer of protection when you sign in.
security.requiredHint: Two-factor authentication is required. Set it up below to continue using the app.
security.unavailable: Two-factor authentication is currently disabled by an administrator.
security.enableIntro: When enabled, you'll enter a one-time code each time you sign in.
security.disableBlocked: Two-factor authentication is required and can't be turned off.

card.title: Two-factor authentication
card.enabled: Enabled — a code is required at sign-in.
card.enabledVia: Enabled via {method} — a code is required at sign-in.

method.title: Method
method.totpHint: Use an authenticator app to generate codes offline — more secure.
method.emailHint: Receive a one-time code by email each time you sign in.

changeMethod.title: Change method
changeMethod.hint: Switch to a different second factor. You'll set it up and verify it before it takes over.
changeMethod.confirmText: Your current method is turned off as soon as you start, and stays off until you verify {method}. Continue?

email.enrollHint: We sent a verification code to {email}. Enter it below to finish setup.
email.resent: A new code has been sent to your email.

security.scanHint: Scan this with an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy…), or enter the key manually.
security.recoveryHint: Store these somewhere safe. Each code can be used once to sign in if you lose your device.
security.recoveryCodesHint: Each code works once. Regenerating replaces all existing codes.

permissions.readonlyHint: Permissions are defined in code and can't be edited here — assign them to roles on the Roles page.
